title: HandoffEnvelope
description: Canonical Structured Output schema for HAND-01 / HAND-02 / HAND-03 tokens defined in prompts/meta/meta-ops.md. Introduced in meta v5.1.0 (Concurrency-Aware). Enforced by wrapper at envelope construction time; agents MUST emit fields conformant to this schema in their HAND token body.
$comment: v5.1 is a documentation + wrapper-hint artifact; runtime validator lives at harness layer in v5.2. A10 SSoT: prompts/meta/ — this file is a derived projection of HAND-xx definitions in meta-ops.md §HAND-01..03.

hand_type.description: Token kind. HAND-01 = DISPATCH (coordinator → specialist), HAND-02 = RETURN (specialist → coordinator), HAND-03 = Acceptance check (auditor → coordinator).

session_id.description: UUID v4 identifying the Claude Code session / workspace that authored this envelope. Used by LOCK-ACQUIRE / LOCK-RELEASE to attribute branch ownership. Required under concurrency_profile=='worktree'; still required under 'legacy' for traceability.

branch_lock_acquired.description: Whether the authoring session holds an exclusive lock on the working branch at the moment this envelope is constructed. MUST be true for any HAND that produces writes (HAND-02 SUCCESS). HAND-01 may set false when dispatching to an agent that will acquire the lock itself.

verification_hash.description: sha256 (hex, lowercase, 64 chars) over the canonical serialization of 'payload'. Allows downstream consumers to detect envelope tampering or drift between handoffs. Supersedes the placeholder artifact_hash in meta-ops.md §HAND-01-ENV.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at envelope construction (e.g., 2026-04-11T12:34:56Z).

meta_version.description: Meta-system version that produced this envelope. Expected value for schema-draft envelopes: '5.1.0'.

task.description: One-sentence task description bound to a CHK-id.

inputs.description: File paths the target agent MAY read.

constraints.description: Scope constraints, stop conditions, axiom references.

branch.description: Target git branch. Under concurrency_profile=='worktree' this branch MUST have an active lock owned by session_id before target agent begins writes.

worktree_path.description: Optional. Under 'worktree' profile, absolute or repo-relative path to the git worktree where writes will occur. Convention: ../wt/{session_id}/{branch_slug}.

parent_envelope_hash.description: Optional. verification_hash of the HAND token that caused this dispatch, forming an audit chain.

status.description: Specialist outcome. SUCCESS = artifacts produced and self-verified. FAIL = attempted but blocked (see issues). REJECT = refused due to stop condition / scope violation.

produced.description: List of file paths written. MAY be empty on FAIL/REJECT. Each path MUST lie within the domain lock's write_territory (DOM-01/DOM-02).

issues.description: Blocker descriptions. MUST be empty on SUCCESS.

detail.description: Optional self-evaluation, convergence numbers, diff stats.

lock_released.description: Under 'worktree' profile: whether this RETURN concurrently releases the branch lock. Default true on SUCCESS, false on FAIL (for retry).

stop_code.description: Present only on FAIL/REJECT. References meta-ops.md §STOP-RECOVER row.

Hand03Payload.description: Acceptance check result. Source: meta-ops.md §HAND-03. 7-item checklist (6 legacy + 1 v5.1 addition).

checks.description: C7 is new in v5.1: session_id + branch_lock_acquired + verification_hash present and schema-valid.

reviewed_envelope_hash.description: verification_hash of the HAND-02 being audited.
